From Classroom Data to School Leader Reports — in Minutes

Test Score Simulator (TSS) helps DepEd teachers simulate, analyze, and consolidate test scores with professional MPS reports, item analysis, and objective tracking — all in a clean desktop app.

Features

Everything a Teacher Needs,
Nothing They Don't

TSS is purpose-built for the DepEd grading system — no complicated setup, no spreadsheet formulas, no guesswork.

📊
MPS & Proficiency Analysis
Automatically computes Mean Percentage Score and classifies each student as Highly Proficient, Proficient, Nearly Proficient, Low Proficient, or Not Proficient per DepEd standards.
🎯
Item Analysis
See which test items students struggled with most. Identify easy, average, and difficult items at a glance — perfect for improving future assessments.
📋
Objective Tracking
Map test items to learning objectives and see exactly which competencies your class has mastered and which need more attention.
📁
Consolidation Reports
Combine multiple class sections into a single consolidated report. Generate the summaries your department head and principal actually need.
🔥
Heatmap Visualization
Visual item difficulty heatmap instantly shows patterns across your score table. Color-coded proficiency rows make performance gaps obvious.
💾
Save, Export & Print
Save your work as a .tss file, export to Excel, or print clean formatted reports — all with one click. Works fully offline, no internet required.
How It Works

Up and Running in 4 Steps

No training needed. If you can use a spreadsheet, you can use TSS.

1
Enter Your Roster
Add student names and mark answers as correct or incorrect. Paste from Excel or type manually.
2
Set Objectives
Map your test items to learning objectives so TSS knows which competency each question covers.
3
Simulate & Analyze
Hit Generate. Get instant MPS, proficiency levels, item analysis, and objective breakdowns.
4
Export & Report
Print, export to Excel, or consolidate multiple sections into one report for your school leader.
Pricing

Start Free. Upgrade When You're Ready.

Try TSS at no cost. Activate when you're managing more sections and need the full toolkit.

About the Author
Joe Ed Mialen
Professional Licensed Educator · Developer · Tool Builder

A Licensed Educator by profession and a self-taught developer by passion. My journey in programming started in 2014 — driven not by ambition, but by a stubborn refusal to do repetitive work manually. I've built websites, desktop apps, and automation tools for DepEd schools and divisions across Negros Occidental. TSS is my latest — and most public — release.

🌐 See All My Projects Facebook Page
TSS ·

Test Score Simulator — Built for DepEd Teachers

GitHub  ·  Download  ·  Pricing  ·  Comments  ·  Author  ·  📘 Facebook Page

Test Score Simulator (TSS) is a free MPS calculator and item analysis tool for DepEd teachers in the Philippines. Compute Mean Percentage Score, classify students by proficiency level (Highly Proficient, Proficient, Nearly Proficient, Low Proficient, Not Proficient), perform item analysis, track learning objectives, and generate consolidated reports for your department head or school principal. Free download for Windows 10 and Windows 11. Designed for K–12 DepEd classroom assessment. No internet connection required.
